Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Confirming Sale Of Real Property
Off Calendar Jul-08-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
-Atty. Daniel Iannitelli (415-324-8801) appearing for Plaintiff Clarice Lacau.
-Appearing through CourtCall Atty. Yano Rubinstein (415-967-1970) appearing for Defendant Rachel Cornell.
-Atty. Mark Romeo appearing for Golden Properties.
-Atty. Christy Styer (415-986-8122) *710, Court Appointed Referee.
-Atty. David Wiseblood (415-547-2700) appearing for Red Bridge.
-Atty. Philip Seltzer (415-967-1970) appearing for Defendant Rachel Cornell.
-Mr. Suheil Alaraj (415-215-6556) appearing as a bidder.
-Sergio Iantorno (415-440-0205), Broker.

Atty.Philip Seltzer presents his argument to the Court in support of moving forward with the sale of the property, and having it sold as is pursuant to the interlocutory judgment. Atty. Daniel Iannitelli presents his objections to Mr. Seltzer's argument. Atty. Christy Styer states that there is a condition that the owners unitl will be delivered empty. The Court states that a clarification on the owners unit needs to be addressed prior to moving forward.

Interlocutory judgment provides for sale as is. At this time "as is", includes 3 tenancy claims. The buyer not willing to bid subject to all tenancy claims. This motion is not proper for determination of tenancy claims and leases for the units as the property. The motion ordered off calendar as sale confirmation could not proceed at this time. Parties, bidders and referee to address the matter and/or proceed with future motions subject to interlocutory judgment " as is" provision.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows: OTHER CHRISTY STYER'S Motion For Order Confirming Sale Of Real Property is taken off calendar. Judge Garrett L. Wong, Clerk:N. Wong, Not Reported, D501.
